title: Urea/SDS Solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"88cg0","text":"For use in \"FASP Kit Protocol-OrNL Developed for Bacteriophage\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":12,"length":50}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"8C49389B934B42E9A080616642A17903","url":"http://protocols.io/view/FASP-Kit-Protocol-ORNL-Developed-for-Bacteriophage-ddn25d"}}}}
steps: In falcon tube, add 1 fleck DTT (10mM) to 5mL Tris HCl (provided with FASP kit) or Tris CaCl₂. Vortex briefly.
Add 1mL Tris buffer + DTT to 1 tube urea (75 µg, provided with FASP kit). Vortex until all powder dissolves.
Combine 300µL Urea solution and 150µL sample (sample can be in any form, mixture of viral proteins and bacteria, ionic or non-­ionic detergents, buffers and/or CsCl).
Rock at room temperature for 30 min to 1 hr to lyse bacteria cells/phage particles. 01:00:00
creator: Verve Team
